parsed_output.justification: Tyler claimed to be the Drunk, but his accusations against Erin were unsupported and perceived as deflections by the other players. While Margaret's claims were inconsistent (switching from Troublemaker to Robber), the overall consensus of the group identifies Tyler as the Werewolf.
